description: Engine same-state message arm body effect (§51.0.S.3). Each .Inc dispatch runs the arm body (@total += 1) and resolves .Counting (self-target). Three clicks drive @total to 3; the engine stays Counting.
rationale: §51.0.S.3 a same-state arm still RUNS its body effect on every dispatch even though it resolves the current state (no external transition). Three .Inc -> total 3.
